description: Minimal vulnerable architecture - Internet directly to web server to database, no controls

expected_attack_paths.rationale: Direct path from Internet to Database through Web Server with no security controls

ransomware.rationale: No backup, no EDR, no segmentation

application_vulns.rationale: No WAF, direct Internet exposure, no patching visibility

phishing.rationale: No MFA, no email gateway mentioned

insider_threat.rationale: No access logging, no least privilege, direct DB access

dos.rationale: No load balancer, no DDoS protection, single web server

rationale: Worst-case architecture: Direct Internet exposure, no security controls, single path to sensitive data
